3e32dfe5-0d96-44a5-ac2f-edab5f5b338b: In my CV-JD Suitability Checker repo (DeBERTa-v3 + RAG), I'd add an AI-driven evaluation harness: use Claude to auto-generate 100+ paired (CV, JD) test cases across edge scenarios (career pivots, multi-domain backgrounds, gap years), then run the harness against each commit to track regression in match-quality. Current evaluation is ad-hoc — automating with Claude tool-use would let me iterate the retrieval prompt weekly with confidence, and surface failure modes I'd otherwise miss.
